compiled_state.title: Update merge-state.sh for worktree-to-session merge semantics
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh to correctly handle worktree-to-session merges:

1. Add context detection: distinguish worktree-to-session merge from session-to-main merge
2. In worktree-to-session context: ms_get_worktree_only_files must return the INCOMING (worktree) branch changes
3. Add ms_is_worktree_merge() helper function for context detection

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)

### TDD Requirement
RED tests from task T1 must turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-merge-state-worktree.sh
- [ ] ms_is_worktree_merge function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'ms_is_worktree_merge' plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh

comments.body: Fixed: merge-state.sh updated with ms_is_worktree_to_session_merge + ms_get_incoming_only_files. 101 tests pass.
comments.author: Test
